summary: Finite Phase-A clause partition decision procedure; product checker NOT_RUN.
requires: all clause guards are R0-safe
pairwise disjointness proven or rejected
preconditions: normalize aliases and closed constructor domains
all guards are R0-pure and terminating
normalization: normalize enum/Option/Result/sealed constructors, literal equality, scalar intervals, and closed-union alternatives
decision_procedure: construct a finite subject-domain partition from closed constructors, literals, normalized intervals, and closed-union alternatives
intersect each arm head and R0 guard with that partition
reject the first source-ordered nonempty overlap with DECL_CLAUSE_OVERLAP
reject undecidable disjointness with DECL_CLAUSE_DISJOINTNESS_UNPROVEN
subtract covered cells; one final otherwise covers the exact remainder
reject a nonempty remainder with DECL_CLAUSE_NONEXHAUSTIVE; Option, Result, and throws add no implicit arm
otherwise admit
termination_metric: finite normalized partition cell count plus finite arm count
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic
